headline: Assessing United Airlines (UAL) Valuation After Mixed Returns And A Flagged Intrinsic Discount
summary: What recent returns suggest about United Airlines Holdings (UAL) United Airlines Holdings (UAL) has logged mixed share performance recently, with a 0.4% decline over the past day and a small gain over the past week, while month and past 3 months returns have been negative. Against that shorter term volatility, the stock shows a positive 1 year total return, alongside multi year total returns that indicate compounding that some investors may contrast with current valuation metrics and business...
